=Rat Defence=
At this point, black has 2 main options. '''[[/3...dxe5/]]''', the best move according to the engine; and '''[[/3...Nc6/]]''', the Lisbon Gambit.
title: Chess Opening Theory/1. d4/1...d6/2. c4/2...e5/3. dxe5
